headline: SpaceX just completed the largest IPO in history — raising $75B in a single offering
context: SPCX priced at $135 and surged 19% to $160.95 on day one. Retail investors can now own a direct stake in SpaceX for the first time.
source: Source: Morningstar / Wall Street Horizon, June 12, 2026

headline: PCE inflation hit 3.8% — nearly double the Fed's target with no cuts in sight
context: Nine of 18 FOMC members now pencil in a rate hike before year-end; the Q4 2026 core inflation forecast was revised from 2.7% to 3.3%.

headline: 3 tickers worth watching right now

items.reason: Semiconductor ETF absorbing $3.2B in net retail inflows since Jan 2025 as hyperscalers commit $600–720B in AI capex — a 36–70% YoY surge
SpaceX: largest IPO in history at $75B, +19% day one — structural institutional demand and a decade-long infrastructure story
BlackRock's top AI ETF pick for 2026 — diversified exposure to the AI buildout without concentrated single-stock risk

source: Source: BlackRock / Morningstar / Wall Street Horizon, June 2026

headline: 54% of Americans are living paycheck to paycheck — one expense away from crisis
context: 34% now describe their financial situation as 'struggling' or 'in crisis,' up from 22% in 2021 — a 55% deterioration in just five years.
source: Source: Ramsey Solutions, State of Personal Finance Q1 2026

headline: $500 a month for 30 years turns $180K in contributions into over $1.1M
context: That's a 6x return on actual dollars invested — powered by consistent index fund investing at ~10% annually. Automate it and forget it.
